About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Learn about our journey and commitment to excellence
About.storyText: Definite Dental Clinics is one of Jordan's most advanced dental and aesthetic centers, located in the heart of Abdoun, Amman. Supervised by a professional team of specialists, we are dedicated to providing world-class treatments in a comfortable, modern environment. Our clinic combines cutting-edge technology with personalized care to deliver exceptional results for every patient.
About.missionText: To provide the highest standard of dental and aesthetic care, making premium treatments accessible and comfortable for everyone.
About.visionText: To be the leading dental and aesthetic clinic in Jordan, known for innovation, excellence, and patient-centered care.
About.focusText: Our clinic proudly specializes in both comprehensive dental treatments and advanced facial aesthetic procedures, making us a one-stop destination for your smile and skin.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive dental and facial aesthetic treatments
Services.dentalDescription: From routine care to advanced procedures, our dental team provides comprehensive solutions for a healthy, beautiful smile.
Services.facialDescription: Advanced aesthetic treatments to rejuvenate, refresh, and enhance your natural beauty.
Services.contactToBookMessage: This service is available at our clinic. For the best experience, we handle booking personally.
